product_overview: A comprehensive web platform combining AI-powered design tools with print-on-demand services, product management, and multi-gateway payment processing to enable users to create, customize, and order printed and digital products seamlessly.
core_goals: Enable users to easily create and customize design assets using AI-powered tools.
Provide comprehensive print-on-demand services including various product types such as digital printing, large format prints, and event stands.
Offer a smooth and secure e-commerce experience with product browsing, shopping cart, checkout, and multi-gateway payment options.
Support both physical and digital product sales with corresponding order and download management.
Administer all operational aspects including orders, users, payments, products, quotes, and email notifications through a robust admin dashboard.
Ensure secure user authentication and role-based access controls for different system functionalities.
Provide multi-language support and responsive, accessible UI components to enhance user experience.
key_features: Authentication System with registration, login, password reset, and role-based access control managed via Supabase.
AI Studio enabling generation of images, logos, and fonts using OpenAI API.
Print Services encompassing digital printing, large format printing, and event stand products.
Product Management with catalog viewing and detailed product pages with configuration options.
Shopping Cart functionality supporting both physical and digital products.
Multi-gateway Payment Processing integrating PayPal and Wompi payment gateways including 3D Secure authentication.
Order Management allowing users and admins to track and manage orders.
Checkout processes for both standard and simplified user flows.
Admin Dashboard for comprehensive management of products, orders, payments, users, quotes, and email settings.
User Dashboard for personal order tracking, design management, and account settings.
Digital Products management including download capabilities for purchased digital goods.
Interactive Design Editor for product customization.
Quote System for custom order requests and management.
Responsive Navigation supporting mobile and desktop views.
Supabase database integration supporting backend data management.
Email Services for system notifications and user communications.
Internationalization and multi-language support with English and Spanish translations.
Reusable UI components built using Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for consistent look and feel.
user_flow_summary: User registration, login, and profile management with role-based access control.
AI Studio flow: select design type, generate design using AI, edit, and save designs.
Browse and configure products, add to shopping cart, and manage cart contents.
Checkout flow selecting payment gateway, entering payment details, and order confirmation.
Admin tasks including managing products, orders, payments, users, quotes, and email settings through the admin dashboard.
Users access their dashboard to review and manage their orders, designs, and account settings.
Request a quote through the quote system and track quote status.
Download purchased digital products from user dashboard or digital downloads section.
Use design editor to customize product designs before purchase.
validation_criteria: All authentication features must handle user registration, login, password reset, and enforce role-based access controls without security vulnerabilities.
AI Studio must successfully integrate with the OpenAI API to generate designs accurately and responsively.
Print service pages must load correctly and include all offered services (digital printing, large format, event stands).
Shopping cart must maintain state correctly for both physical and digital products across user sessions.
Payment processing must support PayPal and Wompi gateways with secure 3DS authentication and handle successful and failed payments gracefully.
Order management must reflect accurate order statuses, and updates must be consistent across user and admin views.
Checkout process must complete successfully, displaying confirmation and order details post-payment.
Admin and user dashboards must load respective data correctly and allow management of entities as intended.
Quote system must accept requests, store them, and allow administrative follow-up.
Internationalization must properly load and switch languages for UI components and static content.
Email services must send notifications reliably for events like registration, order status updates, and quote responses.
